message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
skinparam lifelinestrategy solid
skinparam noteFontColor black
skinparam noteBackgroundColor #FFFFCC
skinparam noteBorderColor #CCCC99
skinparam participantFontColor black
skinparam participantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
skinparam participantBorderColor #CCCCFF
skinparam participantPadding 5
skinparam sequenceArrowThickness 2
skinparam sequenceLifeLineBackgroundColor #F0F0F0
skinparam sequenceLifeLineBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam sequenceBoxBackgroundColor #F8F8F8
skinparam sequenceBoxBorderColor #CCCCCC
skinparam sequenceBoxFontStyle bold

actor "mobile" as mobile
participant "www" as www
participant "endpoint" as endpoint
participant "haproxy" as haproxy
participant "ipfs" as ipfs
participant "postgraphile" as postgraphile
participant "CITY Custom Net" as citynet
participant "logstash" as logstash
participant "dApp" as dapp
database "postgres" as postgres
database "elastic" as elastic
participant "prometheus" as prometheus
participant "kibana" as kibana

== webUI ==
mobile -> www: sign & send events
note right of mobile: browser ext or mobile wallet
www -> haproxy: HTTPS gateway & peer tcp/4001
haproxy -> ipfs: /ipfs/{CID}
haproxy -> citynet: HTTPS (oauth by EC Address)
note right of www: User makes deposit / signs entry to trigger events.

== api - Admin/Write api ==
www -> citynet: /v2 - read/write factom api
www -> ipfs: /ipfs/{CID} - readonly gateway
www -> postgraphile: /graphql - readonly graphql queries
citynet -> logstash: livefeed log
logstash -> elastic: index event logs
citynet -> dapp: dApp specific events
dapp -> citynet: Query/Sign
dapp -> citynet: sign and dispatch requests
citynet -> dapp: read/write signed factom entries

== dashboard ==
kibana -> prometheus: dashboard query
prometheus -> prometheus: poll()
citynet -> prometheus: Monitor(FA2XXXXXXXXX) Balance changes
citynet -> prometheus: HTTP GET /metrics
www -> prometheus: HTTP GET /metrics
prometheus -> kibana: metrics query
elastic -> kibana: dApp specific rollup

== dApp - controller ==
citynet -> dapp: dispatch on-chain event
dapp -> logstash: dApp specific logging
dapp -> ipfs: pin entry content on IPFS

@enduml
```
